title: campylotropis polyantha var. neglecta
intro: Campylotropis polyantha var. neglecta, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campylotropis polyantha var. neglecta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and processing the roots, stems, and leaves, which can be used to make teas, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
